title: pi package: tsconfig.json + package.json setup
description: Create tsconfig.json for tsc compilation. Update package.json with pi manifest (extensions: ./dist/index.js), peerDependencies, build scripts. Version bump to 0.3.0.
design: tsconfig: ESNext/bundler, outDir=dist. package.json: pi.extensions=[./dist/index.js], peerDeps for pi+typebox
acceptance_criteria: tsconfig.json exists, package.json has pi key, npm install succeeds
notes: typescript added to devDeps, keywords pi-package for discoverability

title: Remove /whoami command from index.ts
description: pi builtin /name provides identical functionality. Remove registerCommand('whoami') block to reduce code.
design: Remove 15-line registerCommand('whoami') block — pi builtin /name is identical
acceptance_criteria: No whoami references in index.ts, tsc passes

title: Verify session-recap.py supports Claude Code sessions
description: Check if session-recap.py searches ~/.claude/projects/ in addition to ~/.pi/agent/sessions/. If not, add Claude Code session discovery.
design: session-recap.py is in agent-config/pi-skills, not andenken. It only scans ~/.pi/agent/sessions/. Claude Code support needs to add ~/.claude/projects/ scanning.
acceptance_criteria: session-recap.py discovers and parses Claude Code sessions in ~/.claude/projects/
notes: Out of scope for andenken repo — belongs to pi-skills/session-recap. session-indexer.ts in andenken already supports both sources for vector indexing.

title: Fix index.ts syntax error: unclosed IIFE in device const
description: Line ~110: device IIFE missing closing })(); — causes parse error. The try/catch block flows directly into pi.on() without closing the IIFE.
design: IIFE for device const was missing closing })(); — one-line fix
notes: Verified with npx tsx - only remaining error is missing peerDep (expected)

title: Add source field to DB schema and session_search filter
description:
session-indexer already tags chunks with source (pi|claude), but store.ts DB schema lacks source column and session_search tool has no source filter parameter.

Tasks:
1. store.ts: add source column to DB schema (addChunks, createTable, SearchResult)
2. index.ts session_search tool: add optional source parameter for filtering
3. cli.ts search-sessions: add --source flag
4. Reindex with --force to populate source column
5. Update AGENTS.md if needed
6. Rebuild dist/
design: Add source column to DB schema, source filter param to session_search tool and CLI, source tag in formatted results
acceptance_criteria: 1. DB stores source per chunk 2. session_search accepts optional source param 3. Results show [pi] or [claude] tag 4. CLI --source flag works 5. Reindex populates source
notes: Reindexed 314 files → 10,212 chunks with source field. Full rebuild ~4m40s.

title: Build and verify pi package installation
description: npm run build → dist/ generation. pi install /path/to/andenken. Verify: no Extension issues, status bar shows chunks, session_search/knowledge_search as native tools, /memory commands work, /new auto-indexing.
design: npm run build → dist/. pi install local path. Remove memory-status.ts symlink (replaced by andenken extension).
acceptance_criteria: 1. npm run build OK 2. pi install OK 3. pi restart: no Extension issues, statusbar shows chunks, session_search/knowledge_search native, /memory commands work, /new auto-indexing
notes: Verified after pi restart: session_search + knowledge_search as native tools, before_agent_start hook injects device/time, API key loaded from ~/.env.local directly

title: Fix import paths .ts → .js for ESM tsc output
description: All local imports use .ts extensions (e.g. ./store.ts). tsc outputs .js files so ESM resolution fails. Change all local imports to .js extension across index.ts, cli.ts, indexer.ts, retriever.ts.
design: sed replace .ts→.js in 4 files. Fixed 3 type errors: formatResults details union, indexSessions notify level, session-indexer cast
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes, npm run build produces dist/ with all .js + .d.ts
notes: 14 import paths changed. tsc strict mode caught real issues.
